keyFindings.description: Section 3.5 placement between Analyze and Pre-Ship Verification is slightly late for a rule that applies 'throughout implementation', but mitigated by Essential Rule #8 in SKILL.md

note: Re-review after implementer addressed prior feedback. All 3 prior findings (P1 merge conflict, P3 sessionID type, P3 multi-arg test) resolved. All acceptance criteria verified. CI green.
